title: A Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Negotiate with 88 Vision Trip Corporation for the Acquisition of a Portion of Land Covering an Area of 600 Square Meters Located at the Los Baños-calamba Boundary for the Construction of Various Tourism Related Structures. (AUTHOR: HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 03/16/2020)
